ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store's opening hours */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "brand_category" TEXT /* Category of the brand (e.g., luxury, budget) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., dairy, bakery) */,
  "weight_volume" TEXT /* Weight or volume of the product */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "week_starting" TEXT /* Date of the week when the sale was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "advert" INTEGER /* Whether the sale was advertised (1) or not (0) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount applied */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "sale_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketers" (
  "marketer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the marketer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the marketer (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the marketer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the marketer belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the marketer was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "marketer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketer managing the campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., digital, print) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Intended target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_marketer_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketer_id") REFERENCES marketers ("marketer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_products" (
  "campaign_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-product association */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "promotional_price" REAL /* Special pricing during the campaign */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount applied (e.g., percentage, flat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_products_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed access rights and permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
